title: Time for flexible cross-border funds to fix EU’s energy grid connections? [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: The Connecting Europe Facility has been limited to necessary cross-border projects that aren’t getting national funding, so far. But should domestic grid connections be eligible?
summary_public: The Connecting Europe Facility has been limited to necessary cross-border projects that aren’t getting national funding, so far. But should domestic grid connections be eligible?
